Druid1: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.
Druid2:
Wraeclast has suffered for too long.
You are vengeance incarnate.
Huntress1: You became a weapon of war so that others could live in peace.
Huntress2: You were chosen by the Sacred Wisps to enact the Spirit's will.
Huntress3: Corruption cost you your home, but taught you so much more...
Mercenary1: Countless wars have left you with skills somewhat resembling a decent officer...
Mercenary2: There's something very wrong with this world... and you're going to fix it.
Mercenary3: The more you embrace virtue gems, the more power they offer...
Monk1: They made you a human weapon... but that strength has set you free.
Monk2: True strength lies within. One must only focus... and believe.
Monk3: The truth of your faith threatens to break your very soul... but in that struggle lies power beyond belief.
Ranger1: A woman can change the world with a single well-placed arrow.
Ranger3: There are venoms and virtues aplenty in the wilds, if you know where to look.
Sorceress1: The rumble of thunder heralds your approach. Woe to those that draw your ire.
Sorceress2: The tapestry of time is yours to weave; an element you alone may master.
Sorceress3: By your command, they will earn redemption...one duty at a time.
Warrior1: Incredible might has always laid buried within you. Now is the time to rise.
Warrior2: Your home has been threatened. A good man must be roused to war.
Warrior3: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.
Witch1: You seek power at any cost... and there is no price too high to pay.
Witch2: Your search for power took you on a journey inwards.
Witch3: Death is your domain, your flesh merely a material to be mastered.
Witch3b: The Well of Souls is yours to command.
